programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze and 1.6m swell, today's session will be more of a windblown wobble than a proper ride.
🌊 Swell: 1.6m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:
